reviews.comment:
Excelente atención, personal de la cafetería muy atentos,  playeros eficientes las demorado en función del volumen de carros e lá entrada é inversa a direcion en lá ruta 40.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, very attentive cafeteria staff, efficient waiters delayed them depending on the volume of cars and the entrance and reverse direction on Route 40.

(Translated by Google)
Very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoMEs3a0lBEAE

reviews.comment:
A pesar de que en temporada de verano suele haber filas largas de autos esperando para cargar debido a la escasez de estaciones que hay en el norte neuquino, los playeros se esmeran para que el trabajo salga lo más rápido posible. Destaco la muy atenta, amable y cordial atención del personal, que sin dudas hace la diferencia.

(Translated by Google)
Despite the long lines of cars waiting to fill up during the summer season due to the scarcity of gas stations in northern Neuquén, the attendants work hard to get the job done as quickly as possible. I must highlight the staff's very attentive, friendly, and courteous service, which definitely makes a difference.

reviewReply.comment: Gracias Andres. Es bueno que reconozcan el trabajo de nuestra gente, que le pone todas las pilas a lo que hace

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/1037497486456345522/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNoa0piTWx3RRAB
